title: S + be worth + V-ing
explanation: be worth 後接動名詞，表示某事物值得進行某個動作。動名詞的邏輯受詞是主句主詞，即主詞是該動作的承受者。例如 The book is worth reading 意為「這本書值得被閱讀」。此句型著重於事物本身具備的價值性。同義表達為 It is worthwhile to V 或 It is worth one's while to V。注意 worth 後不能接不定詞，只能接動名詞或名詞；主詞須是有價值的事物，不能是人。

examples.eng: This movie is worth watching because it has a meaningful message.
examples.chi: 這部電影值得觀看，因為它有深刻的意義。

examples.eng: The historical museum is definitely worth visiting when you come to the city.
examples.chi: 當你來到這個城市時，這座歷史博物館絕對值得參觀。

examples.eng: These classic novels are worth reading for anyone interested in literature.
examples.chi: 對於任何對文學感興趣的人來說，這些經典小說都值得閱讀。

examples.eng: Your effort is worth making if it can improve your English skills significantly.
examples.chi: 如果你的努力能顯著改進英文技能，那就值得付出。

extension.tip: 判斷 worth 的關鍵：主詞必須是可以被「做」的事物（如物品、書、景點），不能是人。動名詞的邏輯受詞永遠是主詞。避免誤用不定詞（×worth to read）或遺漏動名詞結構。

examples.result: ✓ 正確。主詞是物品，動名詞 reading 的邏輯受詞是 book。
✗ 避免。通常不用 worth 搭配人作主詞，應改用 worthy of 或 deserving。

examples.test: The experience is worth to have.
examples.result: ✗ 錯誤用法。×to have → ✓having（must use gerund）

extension.note: 記憶口訣：be worth + V-ing = 事物本身值得被做，主詞是動作的對象，非執行者。

exercises.sentence: The latest technology is worth trying because it saves much time.
exercises.translation: 最新技術值得嘗試，因為它節省了很多時間。

parts: for anyone who wants to understand his life journey.
exercises.sentence: His autobiography is worth reading for anyone who wants to understand his life journey.
exercises.translation: 他的自傳值得閱讀，對於任何想了解他人生之旅的人。

exercises.sentence: That remote island is definitely worth visiting during your summer vacation.
exercises.translation: 那個偏遠的島嶼在夏假期間絕對值得參觀。

parts: if we can achieve success in the competition.
exercises.sentence: All the preparation work is worth making if we can achieve success in the competition.
exercises.translation: 如果我們能在比賽中取得成功，所有準備工作都值得付出。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適當的詞彙完成句子，表達某事物值得進行。
mc_exercises.question_eng: This classic novel is definitely _______ reading because it offers deep insights into human nature.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案為 A。『be worth + V-ing』是固定句型，表示值得做某事。worth 後接動名詞 reading。B 項 worthy 後須接 of 或 to be；C 項 worthwhile 雖可表達相同意義，但須改為 It is worthwhile to read；D 項 deserving 用法錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選出使句子語法正確的選項，表達旅遊景點的價值。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The ancient temple in Kyoto is absolutely worth _______ if you ever travel to Japan.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案為 B。『be worth + V-ing』句型中，worth 後必須接動名詞形式，表示主詞是該動作的承受者。A 項 to visit 為不定詞，不符合語法；C 項原形動詞；D 項過去分詞，都不適當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確形式完成句子，強調付出時間與努力的價值。
mc_exercises.question_eng: Though the assignment seems difficult, the effort is worth _______ because you will acquire valuable skills.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案為 A。『be worth + V-ing』中，動名詞的邏輯受詞是主句主詞 the effort，表示『值得花費』。spending 為正確的動名詞形式。B 項不定詞用法錯誤；C 項原形動詞；D 項被動動名詞不符此句型。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據語境選擇最適當的表達方式，說明某事物的價值。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The documentary about climate change is _______ the time investment, even though it requires two hours to complete.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案為 C。『be worth one's time to V』是標準同義句型，表示值得花費時間做某事。A 項表達不自然；B 項 worthy of being watched 結構冗長；D 項 worthy to watch 用法不當，worthy 後應接 of 而非 to。C 項最符合語境與學測等級。

hints: 句型框架：S + be worth + V-ing，S 必須是有價值的事物
注意：worth 後接動名詞，不能接 to watch

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這個古老的博物館很值得參觀，因為它有許多珍貴的文物。
translation_exercises.answer: This ancient museum is worth visiting because it has many precious artifacts.
hints: 句型框架：S + be worth + V-ing，動名詞表示『值得被進行的動作』
常見錯誤：不要寫成 worth to visit 或 worthy of visiting

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 儘管這本書很厚，但它仍然值得一讀，因為內容引人深思。
translation_exercises.answer: Although this book is quite thick, it is still worth reading because the content is thought-provoking.
key_points: 動名詞邏輯受詞是主詞
讓步句型 + worth 結合
hints: 句型框架：主詞（事物）+ be worth + V-ing，此處 reading 的邏輯受詞是 book
注意：worth 無法用於人作主詞，例如『他值得去愛』不能寫成 He is worth loving

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這家餐廳以其創意菜單聞名，絕對值得光臨，即使價格稍高也不遺憾。
translation_exercises.answer: This restaurant is well-known for its creative menu and is definitely worth visiting, even if the price is a bit higher.
key_points: 邏輯受詞隱含（visiting 的邏輯受詞是 restaurant）
hints: 句型框架：S + be worth + V-ing，其中 S 必須是具體的事物或地點
易錯點：worth 後面直接接動名詞，不需要任何介詞；邏輯受詞是隱含的，不用明確表達
